title: Employee Onboarding Workflow
steps: Send welcome email with start date and first-day instructions
Create employee profile in HRIS system
Set up IT accounts: email, Slack, laptop
Send benefits enrollment link within 30 days

title: Leave Request Processing
steps: Check leave balance in HR system
Verify no conflicts with team calendar
Auto-approve if balance sufficient and no conflicts
Escalate to manager if over 5 days

title: Monthly Payroll Processing
best_practices: Always verify employee count before processing
Generate payslips 5 days before pay date
Keep audit trail of all changes

title: Performance Review Automation
steps: Send review forms to employees 2 weeks before deadline
Send reminder to managers 1 week before
Trigger salary review process if eligible
